name: Suzette
text: The best nail tech in Toti! The attention to detail is really refreshing and the clean and tidy environment makes it even better. My pretty nails make me feel like a million bucks!

name: Anushka
text: I always look forward to seeing Uniska. She makes my nails look so beautiful everytime! I've never left disappointed. She's kind and always makes you feel comfortable. Thank you for always giving me lovely nails!!

name: Robyn
text: Uniska is so professional, she is thorough with her work and makes sure that every nail is perfect. Highly recommend going to her, you won't be disappointed.

name: Prevania
text: Absolutely amazing nail tech! Her work is always neat, precise, and beautiful. She really pays attention to every detail and makes sure each nail is perfect. Highly recommend her if you're looking for quality and professionalism!

name: Rose E
text: Thank you so much Uniska for my Beautiful nails! Will Def come back.

name: Rose E
text: Uniska is very kind and pays attention to detail, I will always support her.

name: Suzette
text: What a treat! Uniska is my favourite and such a perfectionist! Thank you!
